title: compatibility edge
summary: compatibility edge is a core retrieval concept for Compatibility Matrix RAG. In AIWF it should be stored with source path, task context, failure conditions, and a practical use/wrap/document/build decision when applicable.

title: Vol. 1 completion boundary
summary: Compatibility Matrix RAG is considered Vol. 1 balanced when it has scope, non-scope, concepts, source coverage, retrieval questions, chunking policy, QA prompts, and a Vol. 2 queue.
use_when: Use to decide whether this lane is ready for embedding and retrieval testing.
chunking_hint: Keep this card intact as a lane-level control record.
